content.content:
Web search results for query: "webkit.org CSS masonry syntax blog 2024 specification options"

Links: [{"title":"Help us choose the final syntax for Masonry in CSS | WebKit","url":"https://webkit.org/blog/16026/css-masonry-syntax/"},{"title":"Help us invent CSS Grid Level 3, aka “Masonry” layout | WebKit","url":"https://webkit.org/blog/15269/help-us-invent-masonry-layouts-for-css-grid-level-3/"},{"title":"Should masonry be part of CSS grid?","url":"https://ishadeed.com/article/css-grid-masonry/"},{"title":"Brick by brick: Help us build CSS Masonry | Blog | Chrome for Developers","url":"https://developer.chrome.com/blog/masonry-update"},{"title":"CSS { In Real Life } | CSS Masonry Layout Syntax","url":"https://css-irl.info/css-masonry-layout-syntax/"},{"title":"CSS WG Blog – Masonry Spec Update and Open Issues","url":"https://www.w3.org/blog/CSS/2025/09/18/masonry-update-issues/"},{"title":"An alternative proposal for CSS masonry | Blog | Chrome for Developers","url":"https://developer.chrome.com/blog/masonry"},{"title":"The CSS masonry syntax wars","url":"https://bordermedia.org/blog/css-masonry-syntax-wars"},{"title":"CSS Masonry – River's Blog","url":"https://www.moon-odyssey.com/en/css-masonry/"},{"title":"Introducing CSS Grid Lanes | WebKit","url":"https://webkit.org/blog/17660/introducing-css-grid-lanes/"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found about CSS masonry syntax from webkit.org:

## Overview

The CSS Working Group has drafted a specification with two options for masonry syntax: the "Grid Integrated" option and the "Grid Independent" option.

## The Two Main Syntax Options

The specification presents the "Grid Integrated" option and the "Grid Independent" option going head-to-head.

**Grid Integrated Option:** Some people at Apple like having "Masonry" be part of CSS Grid, believing this functionality is a mechanism to expand CSS Grid to create columnar grids as well as modular grids, combined with all the other features of Grid, including the powerful options for defining columns, track spanning, explicit placement, and subgrid.

**Grid Independent Option:** The Chrome team believes that a separate masonry syntax would be the best way to proceed, with concerns around syntax, initial values, and how easy a version combined with grid would be to learn.

## Recent Update: Grid Lanes

More recently, WebKit introduced CSS Grid Lanes, with syntax like `display: grid-lanes; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(250px, 1fr)); gap: 16px;` This represents the evolved consensus from the CSS Working Group on how masonry layouts should work.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.
